spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates that element-scoped transitions respect ancestor clip and transform - the spec's main behavioural difference vs document-scoped.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises clip+rotate respected during transition; the page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't compare with document-scoped to show the contrast - sibling concept covers it but this page reads ambiguously alone.

openQuestions.title: Add document-scoped comparison
openQuestions.detail: Without the side-by-side it's hard to appreciate that clip+rotate respect is new. Render the same card with document.startViewTransition for contrast.

openQuestions.title: Show z-index / stacking interaction
openQuestions.detail: Top-layer transitions break stacking. Element-scoped doesn't. Show overlapping elements during transition.

summary: Clean demonstration of clip+rotate respect. Add the document-scoped comparison to make the value clear in isolation.
